string.text: Just Give Up Man Loaded Successfully.!
Thank you for coming, my {?PLAYER.GENDER}madame{?}sir{\?}.
I see your situation is dire. Do you want to surrender and spare your people from further suffering?
We are starving to death. The city is yours.
We can't hold on any longer. Please have mercy, the castle is yours.
The soldiers are on the verge of mutiny, there is no food left. We surrender.
We are grateful for your mercy!
As your new lord who saves you from starvation, I grant you mercy.
You made a wise choice. Lay down your arms, I spare your lives.
Kalradia will remember this cruelty!
Let's see if you can fight on an empty stomach.
It is too late to beg for mercy. I am coming to crush you.
STOP, We cannot fight you. We surrender!
We accept your surrender. Lay down your arms!
No, you all will be death. Prepare!
A wise choice. You shall be spared.
Enemy forces have surrendered!
The battle continues!
{SETTLEMENT_NAME} wants to negotiate surrender with you.
The commander of {SETTLEMENT_NAME} wants to negotiate surrender with you.
The castellan of {SETTLEMENT_NAME} wants to negotiate surrender with you.
Surrender Negotiation
Accept Meeting
Reject Offer
Starvation has broken the siege stalemate; battle begins!
The starving defenders have launched a desperate sally out!
Offer a Negotiation Meeting
Your previous request is still awaiting a response.
You recently sent a negotiation request. Wait before sending another.
You need to wait before trying negotiation again after a failed persuasion.
Your messenger has been sent. You will receive a response soon.
Negotiation Response
Your proposal was accepted. A representative is ready to meet you.
Your proposal was rejected. The defenders do not believe your position is strong enough.
Go to meeting
We are listening. Speak your terms.[ib:nervous][if:convo_grave]
There is no need for more bloodshed. Hear me out.
The fate of these walls rests on your words.
That is not convincing.
Your words are not enough. We refuse.
Your people do not need to die for a hopeless defense.
Look at the balance of power. This siege is already decided.
Choose surrender, and your people can live.
Your people should not die in a hopeless defense.
Look at the numbers. This siege is already decided.
Choose the honorable path and spare your people.
Your walls are breaking. Prolonging this only wastes lives.
If this turns into an assault, you lose all leverage.
Open the gates and I will keep order over your civilians.
Surrender by treaty protects your honor before all Calradia.
Your supplies and morale decline while my advantage grows.
Do not trade lives for pride. End this with mercy.
A city survives by preserving people, not ruins.
Yield now and the markets reopen instead of burning.
Choose surrender, and history will remember restraint over slaughter.
This argument is no longer available.
Your Mercy is too low to make this argument.
Your Honor is too low to make this argument.
You need a more calculating approach to make this argument.
You are right, there's no need for blood to spill.
No. We will not yield.
I need to hear more.
Just Give Up Man
General Surrender Tendency
Overall multiplier for surrender checks.
Base Surrender Threshold
Higher values make surrender harder.
Player Mercy Multiplier
Scales player Mercy/Cruelty effect.
Required Surrender Count
Accepted surrender count before mercy trait gain.
Enable Siege Surrender
Enable settlement surrender checks during sieges.
Enable Starvation Sally Out
If no surrender, starving defenders can sally out.
Nearby Enemy Lord Strength (%)
Added percentage from nearby hostile lords.
Nearby Lord Detection Range
Map distance used for nearby lord checks around settlement.
Negotiation Easy Threshold
Power ratio needed for Easy persuasion strength.
Negotiation Normal Threshold
Power ratio needed for Normal persuasion strength.
Negotiation Hard Threshold
Power ratio needed for Hard persuasion strength.
Persuasion RNG Preset
Controls random variation in persuasion option chances.
Medium (+/-2)
High (+/-3)
Enable Lord Surrender
Enable surrender dialogs in hostile lord encounters.
Lord Dialog Priority
Conversation override priority for lord surrender lines.
Calculating Trait Multiplier
Multiplier for Calculating trait impact in surrender formula.
Valor Trait Multiplier
Multiplier for Valor trait impact in surrender formula.
Mercy Trait Multiplier
Multiplier for Mercy trait impact in surrender formula.
Honor Trait Multiplier
Multiplier for Honor trait impact in surrender formula.
Enable Patrol Surrender
Enable surrender dialogs for patrol/non-lord hostile encounters.
Patrol Dialog Priority
Conversation override priority for patrol surrender lines.
